def positive_temporary_file_used_for_pure_in_memory_transformation():
    rule_id = "temporary_file_used_for_pure_in_memory_transformation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag workflows that spill to disk despite an in-memory transform being sufficient."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
